best_individual: add(if_then_else(is_water, protected_log(sub(distance, steepness), protected_pow(0.153, 0.052)), protected_div(0.153, protected_div(distance, steepness))), protected_div(distance, 0.222))

hall_of_fame.individual: add(if_then_else(is_water, protected_log(sub(distance, steepness), protected_pow(0.153, 0.052)), protected_div(0.153, protected_div(distance, steepness))), protected_div(distance, 0.222))
add(if_then_else(is_water, protected_log(sub(distance, steepness), protected_pow(steepness, 0.052)), protected_div(0.153, protected_div(distance, steepness))), protected_div(distance, 0.222))
add(if_then_else(is_water, distance, protected_div(0.158, protected_div(distance, steepness))), protected_div(distance, 0.239))
